metadata.title: Configure Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui Design System

story.iWant: Tailwind CSS v4 and shadcn/ui configured with the Balanced Warmth color theme
story.soThat: I can build mobile-first, accessible UI components matching the UX specification
story.tasks: - Follow ux-design-specification.md color palette section - Configure Tailwind with 8px spacing scale (spacing: { 1: '8px', 2: '16px', ... }) - Set up Inter font family as primary typography - shadcn/ui components should use @/components/ui/ path - Verify mobile-first responsive classes work (sm:, md:, lg: breakpoints)

story-context.acceptanceCriteria:
Given the Vite project is initialized (Story 1.1 complete) When I configure Tailwind and shadcn/ui Then the following are successfully set up: - Tailwind CSS v4 installed and PostCSS configured - tailwind.config.js includes Balanced Warmth color palette: - Primary: #E87461 (coral) - Secondary: #A8E6CF (mint) - Accent: #FFD56F (yellow) - Success: #66BB6A - Warning: #FFB74D - Error: #EF5350 - Responsive breakpoints configured: mobile (320px), tablet (768px), desktop (1024px) - shadcn/ui initialized with npx shadcn@latest init - Base components installed: button, card, sheet, toast, progress, form
And src/styles/globals.css includes Tailwind directives and custom theme variables And A test component using className="bg-primary text-white" renders with coral background And Dark mode setup prepared (CSS variables defined, implementation deferred)
Prerequisites: Story 1.1 (Vite project initialized)

doc.title: UX Design Specification
doc.snippet: Chosen Theme: Balanced Warmth (Hybrid of Theme 3 "Gentle Energy" + Theme 4 "Professional Warmth"). Primary #E87461 (coral), Secondary #A8E6CF (mint), Accent #FFD56F (yellow), Success #66BB6A, Warning #FFB74D, Error #EF5350. All combinations verified WCAG 2.1 AA compliant.

doc.title: UX Design Specification
doc.snippet: Primary Actions use Coral #E87461 with white text. Secondary actions use Mint #A8E6CF. Typography: Inter font family. Spacing scale: 8px base unit.

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.snippet: Design System: shadcn/ui + Tailwind CSS v4. Rationale: Mobile-first, customizable, accessible, lightweight. Configure tailwind.config.js with UX spec colors. Initialize shadcn/ui components with @/components/ui/ path.

doc.title: Epic 1 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Story 1.2 delivers design system with responsive utilities and accessible components. Key inputs: theme config (tailwind.config.js), UX spec colors. Key outputs: CSS classes, UI components (Button, Card, Sheet, Toast, Progress, Form).

doc.title: Epic 1 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Production: clsx (latest), tailwind-merge (latest), class-variance-authority (latest). Development: tailwindcss (^4.0.0), postcss (latest), autoprefixer (latest).

artifact.reason: Existing basic Tailwind config with partial color palette (coral, mint, sun). Needs expansion to include full Balanced Warmth theme, responsive breakpoints, spacing scale, and Inter font configuration.
All required dependencies already installed: tailwindcss 4.1.17, postcss, autoprefixer, clsx, tailwind-merge, class-variance-authority, shadcn. Story 1.2 configures these packages.
PostCSS configuration for Tailwind CSS processing.
Vite configuration includes path alias (@/) for shadcn/ui component imports.

story-context.constraints: - Must use exact color hex codes from UX spec (Primary #E87461, Secondary #A8E6CF, Accent #FFD56F) - Responsive breakpoints: mobile 320px, tablet 768px, desktop 1024px - Spacing scale must be 8px base unit (1: '8px', 2: '16px', etc.) - shadcn/ui components must use @/components/ui/ path - All color combinations must meet WCAG 2.1 AA (4.5:1 text contrast, 3:1 interactive elements) - Tailwind CSS v4 required (not v3) - Inter font family as primary typography - 100% test coverage threshold enforced (from Epic 1 testing infrastructure) - Co-located tests: Component.test.tsx pattern - Dark mode CSS variables must be prepared but implementation deferred - Prerequisites: Story 1.1 (Vite project) must be completed first

interface.name: Tailwind Config Theme
interface.signature: theme.extend.colors: { primary, secondary, accent, success, warning, error }; theme.extend.spacing: { 1-20 with 8px increments }; theme.extend.fontFamily: { sans: Inter }

interface.name: shadcn/ui Components
interface.signature: npx shadcn@latest init; npx shadcn@latest add button card sheet toast progress form

tests.standards: Epic 1 establishes 100% test coverage requirement using Vitest + React Testing Library for unit/integration tests. All configuration changes must have accompanying tests. AAA pattern (Arrange-Act-Assert) mandatory. Co-located test files (*.test.tsx) required. Tests must verify: 1) Tailwind config exports valid Config type, 2) Color classes render with correct hex values, 3) Responsive breakpoints apply at specified widths, 4) shadcn/ui components render without errors.
tests.locations: - Configuration tests: tailwind.config.test.ts (verify theme object structure) - Component tests: src/components/ui/*.test.tsx (test each shadcn component) - Integration test: src/App.test.tsx (verify Tailwind classes apply correctly) - E2E test: tests/e2e/design-system.spec.ts (verify visual rendering)
tests.ideas: - AC 1 (Tailwind v4 installed): Verify package.json contains tailwindcss@^4.0.0, postcss, autoprefixer - AC 2 (Color palette): Render test component with bg-primary className, assert computed background-color equals rgb(232, 116, 97) [#E87461] - AC 3 (Responsive breakpoints): Use React Testing Library with window.matchMedia mock, verify sm: class applies at 320px, md: at 768px, lg: at 1024px - AC 4 (shadcn/ui init): Verify src/components/ui/ directory exists with button.tsx, card.tsx, sheet.tsx, toast.tsx, progress.tsx, form.tsx - AC 5 (globals.css): Read file content, assert contains @tailwind base, @tailwind components, @tailwind utilities - AC 6 (Dark mode prep): Verify CSS variables defined in :root and [data-theme="dark"] selectors (implementation deferred)
